texto: O sun, heart of the heavens whose blood of lightInfuses the vigor which transmutes to azureThe black ice strangler of great space obscureI hate you, mask of gold, mist and fire, circularBlind monster blinding all the prey aroundYou who veil the impure dazzling phantasmTo the loving vertigo of my avid gazesThe visions of the colorless abyss of the voidReversed hollow truth-mask of the other world.
explicacao: Citação de Roger Gilbert-Lecomte sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “O sun, heart of the heavens whose blood of lightInfuses the vigor which transmutes to azureThe bl…” articula reflexao, abyss, darkness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e darkness.
